creator: lev@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello bug-followup,

  It is very strange. subversion source tarball doesn't contains bundled neon for many versions... There was logic in port's Makefile to delete bundled neon, apr and apt-uril, but it was comented out at time of 1.3.2 -> 1.4.0 transition.

-- 
Best regards,
 Lev                          mailto:lev@FreeBSD.org
